channel.title: kenny lauderdale
channel.description: 📼Just some guy📼 I discuss lost media, anime to watch, & some of the worst anime of all time. Whatever you're here for, you can be sure kenny lauderdale has you covered. This channel is about covering japanese shows on Laserdisc, lost anime, & cursed VHS tapes most people have never even heard of. If that sounds good to you then you're in the right place. https://x.com/KennyLauderdal3
channel.itunes:author: kenny lauderdale
channel.itunes:subtitle: kenny lauderdale
channel.itunes:summary: 📼Just some guy📼 I discuss lost media, anime to watch, & some of the worst anime of all time. Whatever you're here for, you can be sure kenny lauderdale has you covered. This channel is about covering japanese shows on Laserdisc, lost anime, & cursed VHS tapes most people have never even heard of. If that sounds good to you then you're in the right place. https://x.com/KennyLauderdal3

item.title: The Princess Diana Anime
item.description:
Princess Diana has an anime yes. It's very short & it was almost lost media. Is it good? It's more of a historical oddity than something you'd really watch on it's own, but the fact it even exists in the first place is worth talking about. A real life princess became an anime princess which is kind of magical. This is where I'm just going to post supplemental info now. The company that made this and most of the people who worked on it aren't really well known, nor have they worked on things most people have heard of. It was done very quickly & only meant to be seen once to coincide with her visiting japan in 1986. I doubt they even thought anyone in the current year would be talking about it. That said, I thought it was worth mentioning at least once. Maybe someone will subtitle it?
Follow Kenny Lauderdale here: Anime Fun Posts https://twitter.com/KennyLauderdal3 Patreon https://www.patreon.com/kennylauderdale Sources https://pastebin.com/8MXnScFp
#shorts

Princess Diana has an anime yes. It's very short & it was almost lost media. Is it good? The company that made this and most of the people who worked on it aren't really well known, nor have they worked on things most people have heard of. It was done very quickly & only meant to be seen once to coincide with her visiting japan in 1986. I doubt they even thought anyone in the current year would be talking about it.
